description: Don't allow the monsoon to dictate your fashion sense! Wear these stylish sandals from catwalk to bare the elements and look fabulous. This pair goes with denims, skirts and leggings. UpperTextured synthetic leather upper with forefoot and midfoot straps with velcro closuresAnkle strap looping around the ankle with a velcro closureErgonomically designed footbed with mild padding for instep comfortFloral print and branding on the foot bedMidsoleLightweight Phylon midsoleOutsoleTPU outsole with upraised heelGeometrical patterned grooves on the outsoleSandal careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
